HomePage.title: Design a custom mug online and prepare a print-ready layout in minutes
HomePage.description: Choose a mug model, place artwork on layers, review the result in 3D, and send the ready-to-print image through an API.
HomePage.themeValue: 11 Oz, red rim, large mug, spoon-handle mug

docker.title: Docker dev
docker.description: The implementation stays aligned with the current Next.js app running through docker compose.

editor.title: Layer editor, not hand-coded canvas math
editor.description: The editor uses ready npm libraries so artwork can be dragged, scaled, rotated, and reordered quickly.

print.title: Sublimation-aware output
print.description: The exported artwork keeps a 300 DPI profile and reserves 1 cm safe zones near the handle on both sides.

CreateCupPage.title: Create your own mug design
CreateCupPage.description: Build the design in layers, move artwork across the printable wrap, and inspect the result on a 3D mug.

classic11oz.title: Classic mug
classic11oz.summary: A standard 11 Oz mug for the most common sublimation jobs.

rimRed.title: Red rim mug
rimRed.summary: An 11 Oz body with a red accent ring and handle details.

large15oz.title: Large mug
large15oz.summary: A wider print wrap for fuller compositions and larger graphics.

spoonHandle.title: Spoon-handle mug
spoonHandle.summary: A novelty mug with an integrated spoon and a slightly shorter print zone.

editor.title: Layer editor
editor.description: Add one or more images and position them freely on the mug surface.
editor.canvasHelp: The shaded strips show the handle zones that will not be printed.

layers.title: Design layers
layers.description: Select a layer to move it on canvas or adjust its properties.
layers.empty: No design layers have been added yet.

preview.title: 3D preview
preview.description: Rotate the mug to inspect how the design wraps around the surface.

sendBox.title: Send to print
sendBox.description: When you submit, the app generates a print-ready PNG and forwards it to the external print API.

points.dpi: PNG export is generated at 300 DPI.
points.margin: Both handle margins keep a 10 mm non-printable safety zone.
points.format: The API payload includes the image and physical size metadata in millimeters.

status.success: The design was sent to the print API.
status.errorGeneric: The design could not be sent to print.
